nasb.text: A thousand may fall at your side And ten thousand at your right hand, But it shall not approach you.

esv.text: A thousand may fall at your side, ten thousand at your right hand, but it will not come near you.

cnv.text: 雖有千人仆倒在你的左邊， 萬人仆倒在你的右邊， 但災害必不臨近你。

ccb.text: 尽管千人扑倒在你左边， 万人扑倒在你右边， 你必安然无恙。

csbs.text: 即使千人仆倒在你旁边， 万人仆倒在你右边， 灾祸也不会接近你。
